title: Deploy Gateway Voice
goal: Levar gateway e voice plane para a worktree de deploy e provar o runtime live com health e rotas reais.
scope: suite completa na worktree de deploy
validacao de health e status routes
done_definition: servico live ativo com binario novo
next_actions: reabrir esta ADR apenas se o rollout live regredir
simulation_commands: voice capture idle nao dispara job
voice enqueue manual gera transcript e status routes
evidence: go test ./internal/voice ./cmd/aurelia -count=1 passou na worktree de deploy
servico live ativo com binario novo em /usr/local/bin/aurelia
/health live responde com gateway_routing, primary_llm e voice_capture saudaveis
E2E spool -> Groq STT -> voice_events validado no deploy

handoff.resume_prompt: A slice ADR-20260319-deploy-gateway-voice ja foi aceita. O deploy live esta de pe; foque agora no E2E positivo de wake word e no handoff Antigravity.
